statement.markdown:
# Maximum Non-Stapled Pages

You are given a list of integers representing the number of pages in various books. Your task is to determine the maximum number of non-stapled pages that can be formed using these books. A stapled pair consists of two books of the same size. If the total number of pages in two books is greater than or equal to the maximum number of pages among all books, they can be stapled.

You should return the maximum number of non-stapled pages that can be formed.
statement.inputFormat: The input will consist of a list of integers, where each integer represents the number of pages in a book.
statement.outputFormat: The output should be the maximum number of non-stapled pages that can be formed.
statement.notes:
You can staple any number of books, not just two. You can staple the same book to other books multiple times.

This problem is a classic application of greedy algorithms, as the optimal solution can be determined by selecting the maximum book size at each step and stapling all other books of the same size.

examples.explanation: We can staple all books of size 2 and 3, and the maximum number of non-stapled pages will be 4.

hints.text: First hint text: Use a greedy algorithm to select the maximum book size at each step and staple all other books of the same size.

editorial.title: Maximum Non-Stapled Pages
editorial.intuition: We can use a greedy algorithm to select the maximum book size at each step and staple all other books of the same size.
editorial.bruteForce: A brute force approach would involve checking all possible combinations of stapled and non-stapled pages, which would result in a time complexity of O(n!).
editorial.betterSolution: A better solution would involve sorting the books by their size in descending order and then stapling all books of the same size.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution involves sorting the books by their size in descending order and then stapling all books of the same size.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The proof of correctness involves showing that stapling all books of the same size results in the maximum number of non-stapled pages.
editorial.dryRun: Step-by-step example run: Sort books by size in descending order, staple all books of the same size.
commonMistakes: Not stapling all books of the same size
